is_predoc_posting.description: Whether this text actually describes a specific predoctoral research assistant/fellow job posting. False if it's unrelated content, a blocked/error page, a generic careers or listings page with no specific posting, or any other kind of document. If false, the other fields are ignored, but still fill them with any schema-valid value (e.g. an empty string) since they're required.

institution.description: The full name of the institution or organization offering the position

title.description: The title of the offered position

location.description: The location of the position. Use the full city name, full state/province name (not abbreviations like 'MA' or 'CA'), and full country name, e.g., 'Cambridge, Massachusetts, United States'. If only a country is known, use just the country. Use 'Remote' if the position is explicitly remote.

starts.description: The date when the position starts. Prefer an exact date in YYYY-MM-DD format if one is stated. If only a month and year are known, use 'Month YYYY' (e.g. 'July 2026'). If only a season and year are known, use 'Season YYYY' (e.g. 'Summer 2026'). Must be for the same hiring cycle as the application window below (i.e. after applications open), not a past or generic cohort's start date.

length.description: The approximate length of the position measured in months or years, e.g., '6 months', '1 year', '2 years'

opens.description: The date when applications open. Prefer an exact date in YYYY-MM-DD format if one is stated. If only a month and year are known, use 'Month YYYY' (e.g. 'October 2025'). If only a season and year are known, use 'Season YYYY' (e.g. 'Fall 2025').

closes.description: The date when applications close. Prefer an exact date in YYYY-MM-DD format if one is stated. If only a month and year are known, use 'Month YYYY' (e.g. 'March 2026'). If only a season and year are known, use 'Season YYYY' (e.g. 'Spring 2026').

letters_of_recommendation.description: The minimum number of letters of recommendation required for the application

writing_sample.description: Indicates whether a writing sample is required for the application
